title: SuperSimpleHome
description: A Super Simple Home Management System (Set And TP To Your Home Points Without OP Perms).
body:
**Set And Teleport To Your Home Points Without Needing OP Permissions.**

# Installation

**To get Started, Simply Drop The .jar File Of The Latest Release In Your Mods Folder.**

# Commands

- home.set [*Name*]: Set Your Home Point.
- home.go [*Name*]: Teleport To Your Home Point.
- home.delete [*Name*]: Remove A Home Point.
- home.list: List Your Home Points.
- home.default [*Name*]: Set The Default Home Point Name.
- home.reload-config: Reload The Config From Disk.

**Note: The Default Home Point Name Is For All Players**
**Also Note: "default" & "reload-config" Both Require OP Perms To Run, To Prevent Abuse / Disk Thrashing By Players.**

You Can Set A Default Value For Name In The Config, That Will Be Used If The Name Parameter is Ommited.

# Compatibility

**This Mod Works On Both The Dedicated Server, And The Client's Integrated Server.**
